title: Multiple Use Stew
description: Eat stews and soups multiple times instead of the bowl completely emptying on its first use.
body:
# Multiple Use Stew
This datapack makes the following stews/soups have 3 uses instead of 1 by utilizing the item's durability bar:
- Mushroom Stew
- Rabbit Stew
- Beetroot Soup

After each use, the item's durability will decrease by 1, and once the durability reaches 0, the stew/soup will turn into an empty bowl. This is shown in the following image:

![The amount of uses/durability stew has in the datapack.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a9d881f5423f183de65a611b20bc018b15c323a4_0.webp)

Leave comments about this project on it's [Planet Minecraft Page.](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/multiple-use-stew/)
